title: ServerSleepingPill
description: Need your server to take a nap when no one’s around? Our ServerSleepingPill plugin puts your server to sleep if it’s too quiet for too long!
body:
## ServerSleepingPill Plugin

**Description:**

Tired of leaving your Minecraft server running when no one's online? The **ServerSleepingPill** plugin ensures your server goes to sleep when it's idle. Configure the inactivity timeout, and when no players are around, the plugin will automatically shut down your server, saving resources and energy.

**Features:**
- Configurable inactivity timeout.
- Automatically shuts down the server when idle.
- Cancels shutdown if players join before the timeout.
- **Use [ServerAlarmClock](https://modrinth.com/plugin/sac) to start server when player try to join!**


**How It Works:**
1. Set your desired idle time in the `config.yml`.
2. The plugin monitors player activity.
3. If no players are online for the configured time, the server shuts down.
4. Player joins will cancel any pending shutdown tasks.

Keep your server efficient and eco-friendly with ServerSleepingPill!
